mapper.select:
select count(*) from p_univ pu where 1=1
AND pu.univ_nm like '%${schText}%'
select univ_id , univ_nm , univ_ticket from p_univ pu where 1=1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p_univ ( univ_nm , univ_ticket) VALUES ( #{univNm} , #{univ_ticket})
mapper.select: select univ_id , univ_nm , univ_ticket from p_univ pu where 1=1 AND univ_id = #{univId}
